reviews.comment:
Hoy 02/12 a las 18hs por falta de sistema solo podían recibir efectivo y tarjeta de crédito, y no podían emitir factura por la compra. Ok, son cosas que pasan. Pero que digan que no van a tomar los datos para emitirla cuando vuelva el sistema ni que uno pueda ir con el ticket de la tarjeta para que la emitan (aunque sea una semana después, no me importaba) es lisa y llanamente mala predisposición. Les expliqué que no es legal no emitir factura y que seguramente después se iba a poder pero el encargado decía que no y que no se iba a facturar nunca. Cargué igual porque ya estaba ahí. Inentendible que estando en falta tengan esa pésima predisposición y atención el encargado y el que despachaba el surtidor (de apellido Gamboa). Una vergüenza que representen al ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Today, December 2nd, at 6 PM, due to a system outage, they could only accept cash and credit cards, and couldn't issue an invoice for the purchase. Okay, these things happen. But to say they wouldn't take the information to issue an invoice when the system was back up, or that I couldn't go back with the credit card receipt to get one (even if it was a week later, I didn't care), is simply unprofessional. I explained that it's illegal not to issue an invoice and that they would probably be able to later, but the manager said no and that they would never issue one. I filled up anyway because I was already there. It's incomprehensible that, being in violation of the law, the manager and the person operating the pump (whose last name is Gamboa) had such a terrible attitude and provided such poor service. It's a disgrace that they represent the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtOGVmWFlREAE
